## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run eval:check`
- [ ] `npm audit signatures`
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev`

## Release Surface

- [ ] Pack manifest checked with `npm pack --dry-run --json`
- [ ] No logs, payloads, tests, `node_modules`, or symlink backups in the package
- [ ] Docs updated for any CLI, envelope, target, role, or env-var change
- [ ] Linked Linear issue
